name: Kurapika | Bodyguard
description:
You thought your bodyguard was a girl.

Kurapika was hired by your father when he went away for work. You spent a lot of time with him, unaware of him being a man. That was until you saw him walked out of the shower with his chest exposed.

Artist: @__rette on Twitter/X
